title: Unicode Fix
description: Fixes force unicode font settings doesn't works on some languages in minecraft 1.12.2 below.
body: # Unicode fix This mod fixes the `Force Unicode Font` setting not working with some languages(e.g. Japanese) in Minecraft 1.12.2 below. Supported Minecraft version(s): 1.12.2, 1.8.9, 1.7.10 # Screenshots Debug Screen with Unicode Fix Mod & Force Unicode Font Off
